# Vendored files

`stplugin.c` and `stplugin.h` are StataCorp's Stata Plugin Interface, version
3.0, included **unmodified**. StataCorp distributes them freely for building Stata
plugins (https://www.stata.com/plugins/). They are copyright (c) StataCorp LP and
are not covered by this project's license; they are bundled only so the plugin can
be built against the documented interface.
